data.name: Endless Fucker
data.detailed_description:
Hello human,

Welcome to my simulation... the

Endless Fucker

!


In here, you will be our test subject, recreating your puny life in a compressed, scientifically relevant environment, where you will run an endless rat race in order to achieve personal satisfaction in the form of sex ( or "getting pussy" as you call it ) and money ( useless, trivial stores of "value" ).



Why, you ask? Because I can and I want.

To sum it up, you will run in 4 different environments, dodging obstacles and dangers.

You will be able to collect different sexual partners ( I believe 10 sexy nymphos will suffice for the purpose of inciting you to participate wholeheartedly ).




And, I will throw in different sexual skills for your partners, enabling them to engage in different sexual poses.


With that said, I believe it's time to load the simulation.

Have fun!

data.short_description: Endless Runner mechanics combined with 3D sexual content, gorgeous ladies, different body types and loads of sexual animations.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1
  • 處理器: Intel I5 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1070 or equivalent ( minimum GPU memory 4 GB )
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1
  • 處理器: Intel I5 or Higher
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: RTX 2060 or equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: any

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 8.1
  • Processor: Intel I5 or equivalent
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX 1070 or equivalent ( minimum GPU memory 4 GB )
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 12 GB available space
  • Sound Card: any
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 8.1
  • Processor: Intel I5 or Higher
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: RTX 2060 or equivalent
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 12 GB available space
  • Sound Card: any
